classification.task_goal: Convert a tab-delimited text file to a CSV file using specified parameters.
primary_constraints: source_path must be a valid path to a tab-delimited text file.
csv_path must be a valid path where the CSV file will be saved.
csv_file_name must be the name of the new CSV file.
classification.reasoning: The AI initially provided incorrect code that did not properly handle the file saving and renaming. The user later requested a function that correctly encapsulates the desired behavior, indicating a repair of the constraints.
